3176030.name: Type Tunes
3176030.description:
Bored of quiet or clicky keyboards.....Look no further as Type Tunes has you covered! 
Sending emails? Working on code? Typing a paper? With Type Tunes every alphabet and numeric keystroke will serenade your atmosphere with amazing sounds! Never be bored typing again with Type Tunes! 

With Type Tunes every keystroke will create a joyful "in Key" musical note no matter what program or game you are using. 
With 3 presets Bell, Dub and Piano you can choose the perfect sound that matches your task.
